title: NVR: Exemplary Capital Allocation
text: NVR is a textbook example of excellent capital allocation, consistently earning a 20%+ ROIC on a growing capital base. NVR has reduced their share count by 75% since going public, increasing EPS four-fold on top of organic earnings growth.

title: Could This Be the Next 100x Stock?
text: This fast-growing builder uses a time-tested model that could generate massive returns for patient investors.

title: Homebuilder stocks drop as companies report 8th straight monthly drop in housing sentiment to the lowest reading since start of the pandemic
text: About 1-in-5 homebuilders reported reducing prices to boost sales or limit cancellations, according to the NAHB/Wells Fargo survey.

title: The 7 Best Stocks to Buy for August 2022
text: Coming off its best month since November 2020, it will be tough for the S&P 500 in August to match the 9.1% return it notched in July. The best stocks to buy in August may be some of the best performers from July.
